reviews.review_description: when are you update new puzzles? it has been awhile.

3D puzzles. Only 2 different ones.  But they are good. You can play them with 15 and with 35 pieces.
More difficult then you think.

This is what you get if you combine fantasy with puzzling places. Loved the highly detailed models and can't wait for more! I've included it on my video list of top 10 App Lab games: https://youtu.be/Peq49fV911Y

developer_response.body: Thank you for your compliment! We will keep working on making good games for players!

The animations and graphics artwork are awesome.  More please .🙏

reviews.review_description: I love doing jigsaw puzzles and this game is just that and with somewhat of a story. The images are of high quality and a joy to behold. My only gripe would be that there are only two puzzles (at present) to complete and I'm hoping that in future the developer releases add on packs. For the game as it is, I would recommend.

Magic Puzzle: Dragon & Sword is a video game that has become popular among puzzle game enthusiasts. The game is set in a magical world filled with dragons, swords, and other mythical creatures. Players are tasked with matching different puzzle pieces in order to progress through the game's various levels.
One of the things that sets Magic Puzzle: Dragon & Sword apart from other puzzle games is its colorful and detailed graphics. The game's world is full of vibrant and imaginative creatures and landscapes, making it a joy to explore and play in. The game's music and sound effects are also well done, adding to the overall immersive experience.
Another standout feature of Magic Puzzle: Dragon & Sword is its challenging but fair gameplay. Players must match puzzle pieces in order to clear the board and progress to the next level. The puzzle pieces come in a variety of different shapes and sizes, and they must be matched according to specific patterns in order to clear the board. 
Magic Puzzle: Dragon & Sword is an excellent puzzle game that offers an engaging and entertaining experience for players. Its challenging gameplay and colorful graphics make it a must-play for fans of puzzle games. If you're looking for a game that will keep you entertained for hours on end, Magic Puzzle: Dragon & Sword is definitely worth checking out.

Video Review: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KRQ7Xa4KqOw

developer_response.body: Thank you for your in-depth review! We are glad that you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description: This is only a demo but it is really impressive…the dragon 360degree puzzle is amazing.   How are you the devs going to top it? Be interesting to see. The mechanics are top notch ..give it a try ,it’s worth the trouble
Absolutely beautiful. Graphics and audio are very well done. Looking forward to more!

What a positive demo. Love the scenery of the volcanic cave. Potential for a level 3 which could be a 50-75 piece puzzle. I can't wait to see other dragons in the collection, and see if they interact with each other when you look at your completed puzzles collection.

This is a fascinating puzzle game, well-thought out and the ease of use is quite pleasant. However, the occasional glitches such as freezing and having to force close or not being able to save my favorite puzzle left me disappointed. Despite these issues, I still found the game enjoyable overall.

Absolutely stunning images and beautiful effects. I am glad I had the opportunity to try this demo for free because I have fallen in love with the game and hope they release some packs in the not to distant future!

This should only be a demo but somehow I got charged 0.79 for just two small puzzles. If I had known I would not have purchased this and waited for it to be at least partially finished.  Puzzling places is great value so don’t waste your money on this!!

Lovely 3D puzzle game think it only has 2 puzzles at the moment from what I can see, this app has real potential if they add more content and increase puzzle sizes by adding more pieces.  But overall still a steal for 79p.
Nice idea, but in my version (Meta Quest 2), there text written all over the screen, like an error. I know it's only 0,99, but I would like a refund because of defective program.

developer_response.body: I am so sorry for the problem. Our engineers are  looking to fix the problem.  Would you please provide a problem screen recording and your username to contact@leafboatstudio.com ?This can help us locate and solve problems faster. Thank you !

reviews.review_description: I loved the animation and it kept my attention so my focus was on completing it.  Did I say amazing? More please
